parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Relation type to resolve (spare part, replacement, compatible service).

parameters.name: variantId
parameters.description: Optional source product variant identifier (bound from route `:variantId`).

parameters.name: locale
parameters.description: Optional locale code used to localize response values.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort expression from query string, for example `createdAt_DESC`.

parameters.name: basePath
parameters.description: Optional base path override used by integration routing.
